text: Started with 3 days of gym and sacrificed my morning sleep. Now I'm struggling to wake up at 5:30. The pain is real, but so is the dream of getting back on track.
decision_reason: Addresses the struggle of getting back to the gym and making sacrifices, while also referencing the dream of progress.

text: I see people posting their fitness journeys, but most of them started with a single gym session a week. Not every day, not every morning. Just a start. Now I'm trying to get back on track after 2 months off.

audience_fit.desire: belonging to a group that gets it

decision_reason: Highlights the realistic approach to fitness and the struggles that come with it, offering an empathetic perspective.
